title: refactor(gen): remove dead code, no-op plumbing, and duplicated helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes dead DeepInfra plumbing (provider config, env key, bindings, rotation script — dead since #11562), the all-no-op ProgressManager threaded through ~20 image files, the unreachable flux self-hosted pool (dead since #11502), the translation-era normalizeAndTranslatePrompt memo, and dead balance middleware methods + orphaned shared/billing helpers
- Removes dead-end text request plumbing: private/isPrivate/referrer fields, duplicate stream boolean parser, unreachable maxTokens branch; stops leaking voice:"alloy" and internal config keys (x-portkey-defaultOptions: "[object Object]") into upstream bodies/headers
- Dedupes copy-pasted helpers: toDataUri (5 verbatim copies → utils/imageDownload.ts), closest-aspect-ratio matching (9 implementations → 2 generic helpers in utils/aspectRatio.ts), requireSafePrompt (kontext inline dup → shared util), /image/models route (→ modelsListHandler)
- Bugfix: moderation boolean headers (jailbreak/protected-material) never parsed into Tinybird events on the non-streaming path — z.boolean() always failed on "true" header strings and .catch(undefined) masked it; now parsed as "true"/"false"
- Shrinks AuthResult to its 3 live fields, drops unused callVertexAIGemini userInfo param, removes the any-typed checkBalance injection in images.ts, fixes stale comments claiming enter.pollinations.ai still does tier gating
- Removes unused deps clsx, tailwind-merge, nanoid from gen package.json; root package-lock.json regenerated — may conflict with sibling cleanup PRs #11754/#11752 and should be regenerated on rebase

Not included: nothing skipped — all 17 findings re-verified and applied on main.

Verification: `tsc --noEmit` clean; full gen suite 42 files / 328 tests passed; biome clean (remaining warnings pre-existing).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We just did a massive sweep of the generation worker, feeding hundreds of lines of dead code to the Nomnom creature. The codebase is lighter, cleaner, and ready for what's next.
gist.summary: Refactored the generation worker to remove deprecated DeepInfra plumbing, deduplicate image helpers, and fix a bug where moderation headers weren't parsing correctly into Tinybird analytics.
gist.impact: The codebase is significantly lighter and easier to maintain, and internal analytics now correctly track moderation events.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up a server room. Nomnom eating dead code (represented as old documents), Polly sweeping. Represents removing dead code and cleaning the repo.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature cleaning up a retro server room. Nomnom is happily eating a pile of old documents representing dead code, while the bee hovers nearby holding a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
